package-check.description: Normalize package contract, conformance, property, coverage, typecheck, test, and lint check intent for an Attune package.

generated.description: Normalize generated artifact sync, stale-output, ledger, and provenance intent for an Attune package.

toolchain.description: Normalize Attune typed external toolchain intent for Nix, Joern, Arion, Alchemy, Vite, Kubernetes, mutation, worker fuzz, TypeScript, test, and lint workflows.
